name: ovndb
description: High-performance embedded NoSQL database — B+ Tree, WAL, LRU Cache, AES-256-GCM. Built for 120k+ user WhatsApp bots.

scripts.test: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/basic.test.js
scripts.test:crypto: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/crypto.test.js
scripts.test:stress: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/stress.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/basic.test.js && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/crypto.test.js && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/v1_1.test.js
scripts.demo: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/examples/whatsapp-bot-demo.js
scripts.benchmark: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/examples/million-data-benchmark.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:v1_1: npm run build:full && OVNDB_LOG=silent node dist/test/v1_1.test.js
